CommunityApplications.Profile: Database Backup is a self-hosted Docker image that automates PostgreSQL (12-18), MariaDB/MySQL, and MongoDB dumps via cron. It dynamically installs only the database clients you need at startup, compresses dumps with gzip, rotates old backups based on a per-job retention policy, and ships a built-in healthcheck verifying connectivity to every configured database. Multi-architecture (amd64, arm64) and auto-rebuilt on base image security updates. Source-available under the MIT license. Bug reports and pull requests welcome on GitHub.
